diffCoverage.notes: Two layers touched (types + command). Verified forward-only direction: command imports types; types imports nothing from the core; neither imports zca-rust (kept behind the zalo layer).

findings.evidence: types/ depends on serde only (no core layers, no zca-rust); command/ depends on types/ only. Dependency direction matches types→…→command with no back-edges, so the forward-only DAG (ADR-0003) holds.
findings.fix: When the zalo layer maps types::Credentials into zca_rust::Credentials, keep the mapping inside zalo/ so types stays zca-rust-free.

summary: Cross-layer change spanning types + command reviewed for layering. Forward-only order types → config → store → zalo → session → command is preserved: command imports types, types is self-contained (serde only), and zca-rust stays behind the zalo boundary. No layer back-edges introduced. Approve.
